channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidate says he forgot to close his Kik account
A satisfying conclusion to the CBS-Paramount-Colbert Late Show story
Trump considers replacing 250th anniversary concert with MAGA rally after artists withdraw
item.description: President Trump considers hosting a large MAGA rally for the nation's 250th anniversary after several artists withdrew from the planned Freedom 250 concert.

item.title: Senate candidate Graham Platner sent explicit texts to multiple women while married, wife says
item.description: Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner exchanged sexual texts with several women after marrying his wife, according to reports.
